page: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs with a single thread per core, operating at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. Storage is provided by a local 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core processing capabilities, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, PassMark CPU score, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory performance is also highly rated, with small-block cached read bandwidth reaching the top 10% and large-block uncached read/write speeds scoring in the top 25%. The dedicated CPU allocation supports strong single-core execution, as evidenced by top 25% scores in Geekbench single-core and stress-ng single-core tests.

The server is highly suited for compute-intensive workloads, including software compilation, ray tracing, and image processing, all of which achieved top-tier benchmark results. It also performs exceptionally well in database operations and high-throughput key-value store transactions, as demonstrated by its top-tier Redis SET operations and PassMark database scores. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers a cost-efficient profile for parallel processing tasks that require dedicated CPU resources without the overhead of hyperthreading, though it may be less optimal for memory-bound applications requiring massive RAM capacities.
description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores and vCPUs running at 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM (2.0 GB per core) and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, this KVM-based instance delivers high-density compute resources. Benchmark data indicates top-tier multi-core performance, placing in the top 10% for multi-threaded processing, software compilation, and database operations. The server also features an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and includes one public IPv4 address. It is highly suited for parallel computing tasks, software compilation, ray tracing, and high-throughput database workloads such as Redis. The dedicated core model ensures consistent performance, making it a cost-effective choice for compute-heavy workloads, though its 1:2 memory-to-CPU ratio represents a tradeoff for memory-intensive applications.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for databases and parallel workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server with 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD for high-performance workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core compute-optimized server with local NVMe storage, engineered for high-throughput parallel processing and database workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores operating at 2.3 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory and a 400 GB local NVMe SSD
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and database operations
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Optimized for software compilation, ray tracing, and Redis deployments
